title.purpose: Card titles, section headings, dialog titles. Not for decorative text.

body.purpose: Table cells, form values, description text. Max 70ch on reading surfaces.

label.purpose: Column headers (uppercase), badge text, form labels, tag metadata.

mono.purpose: ALL numeric output: grams, minutes, OMR costs, temperatures, IDs. Tabular width.

shadows.name: ambient-low
shadows.purpose: Cards and containers at rest. Near-invisible; lifts surface off page-gray.

shadows.name: interactive-lift
shadows.purpose: Primary buttons at rest. Signals pressability.

shadows.name: modal-presence
shadows.purpose: Dialog panels only. Separates panel from dimmed backdrop.

motion.name: ease-out-colors
motion.purpose: Button hover, nav item hover, badge color shifts. Never layout.

motion.name: toast-slide-up
motion.purpose: Toast notification entrance. The one choreographed motion allowed.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Sidebar switches from off-canvas to fixed. Topbar shows full layout. Grid columns expand.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call to action. Used once per form or dialog section.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; background: #2563eb; color: #ffffff; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgba(15,23,42,0.10), 0 1px 2px -1px rgba(15,23,42,0.10); transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1d4ed8; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #ffffff, 0 0 0 4px #3b82f6; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action alongside a primary, or standalone import/upload triggers.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; background: #ffffff; color: #374151; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, border-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #f8fafc; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #ffffff, 0 0 0 4px #3b82f6; } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Toolbars, icon-button rows, topbar actions. Zero visual weight at rest.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M19 21H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h11l5 5v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2z"/></svg> Export</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; background: transparent; color: #64748b; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 8px 12px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f8fafc; color: #0f172a; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #ffffff, 0 0 0 4px #3b82f6; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Semantic status label. Color encodes state; always paired with readable text.
components.html: In StockLow StockOut of StockIn Progress
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-badge-success { background: #dcfce7; color: #15803d; } .ds-badge-warning { background: #fef9c3; color: #a16207; } .ds-badge-error { background: #fee2e2; color: #b91c1c; } .ds-badge-info { background: #dbeafe; color: #1d4ed8; } .ds-badge-default { background: #f8fafc; color: #64748b; }

components.name: Data Card
components.description: Groups a related section of data. Never used as a navigation target. Never nested.
components.html:
Cost Breakdown

Material: 1.250 OMR
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(15,23,42,0.05); font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-card-header { padding: 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; letter-spacing: -0.01em; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-card-content { padding: 16px 24px 24px; } .ds-mono { font-family: ui-monospace, 'Cascadia Code', 'Fira Code', monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form field. Error state via red border. Focus via blue ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-label { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #374151; } .ds-input { height: 40px; width: 100%; padding: 0 12px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px; font-family: ui-monospace, 'Cascadia Code', monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #0f172a; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #94a3b8; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: transparent; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #3b82f6; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation
components.description: Role-scoped vertical nav. Active state via background tint only, no side-stripe.
components.css: .ds-sidebar { width: 256px; background: #ffffff; border-right: 1px solid #e2e8f0; padding: 0; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ds-sidebar-logo { padding: 0 24px; height: 64px; display: flex; align-items: center; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; color: #2563eb; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; margin: 2px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #64748b; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #f8fafc; color: #0f172a; } .ds-nav-active { background: #dbeafe; color: #1d4ed8; } .ds-nav-active:hover { background: #dbeafe; color: #1d4ed8; }

narrative.overview:
PrintForge is not a dashboard that announces itself. It is a ledger: a precise, unadorned record of operational truth. Every screen exists to answer one question faster than the operator could ask it. The visual system takes its cue from Linear's light-mode variant: white surfaces, a single authoritative blue accent, monospaced numerics, and negative space used only where it helps the eye navigate, never as decoration.

The interface disappears. The data remains. Typography is system-native. Color is restrained to one role: the brand blue marks what is interactive or selected. Everything else is neutral.

This system explicitly rejects the aesthetic families listed in PRODUCT.md: no SaaS cream, no dark-neon print-farm aesthetic, no enterprise navy, no glassmorphism, no hero-metric template, no entrance animations or data loading choreography.
keyCharacteristics: White-dominant surfaces with a subtle cool-gray hierarchy
Single blue accent (#2563eb), used only on interactive and active states
Monospaced numerics for all quantities, weights, costs, and temperatures
Flat elevation at rest; shadow only as a state response
Table-first layout: information density over empty-state padding
Light mode primary; dark mode matches fidelity, not just inverts

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The primary blue is the only color that signals interactivity or selection. Do not introduce secondary accent colors for status badges, chart series, or section differentiation.

rules.name: The Mono Ledger Rule
rules.body: Every quantity, measurement, or currency value uses the monospace stack. OMR values always show 3 decimal places.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. A shadow on a table row, sidebar, or stat cell is not in this system. If you feel the need to add a shadow to a non-interactive surface, the layout needs fixing, not a shadow.

rules.name: The No Nested Cards Rule
rules.body: Cards are never placed inside cards. Group content within a card using border-top separators or headings.

rules.name: The Table-First Rule
rules.body: When in doubt, use a table. Use a table with overflow-x scroll over a card grid for any list of more than 3 items with more than 2 attributes.

dos: Do use font-family: ui-monospace for every numeric value: grams, minutes, temperatures, OMR costs, spool weights, job IDs.
Do display OMR currency to exactly 3 decimal places on every user-facing surface.
Do use the 2px brand-blue focus ring on every interactive element.
Do use role="dialog" and aria-modal="true" on all dialog panels, with aria-labelledby pointing to a useId()-generated ID.
Do wrap all data tables in an overflow-x-auto container.
Do use background tint (not side-stripe border) to indicate the active navigation item.
Do use semantic badge colors: green for success/in-stock, amber for low/queued, red for error/out-of-stock.
Do transition colors only (transition-colors), not layout properties. Keep transitions to 150-200ms ease-out.
Do design light mode first at full fidelity; dark mode must match, not merely invert.
donts: Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on any card, list item, alert, or callout.
Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient. All text is a single solid color.
Don't build a hero-metric template: big number, small label underneath, gradient accent.
Don't build identical card grids with icon, heading, and text body repeated.
Don't add entrance animations, counter animations, or loading choreography to data.
Don't use dark neon, cyberpunk, or any aesthetic that reads as 3D printing brand.
Don't use enterprise navy or gold as accent colors.
Don't add a second accent color. The one-voice rule is absolute.
Don't use a modal as the first thought for editing data. Prefer inline editing for single fields.
